interval.logic: Maintenance Minder main item A; if no Maintenance Minder message appears within 12 months after reset, change engine oil yearly

maintenance.notes: Honda uses condition-based Maintenance Minder, not a fixed mileage schedule.

maintenance.service: Replace engine oil and oil filter; inspect brakes, steering, suspension, fluid levels, exhaust, and fuel lines
maintenance.notes: Performed when Maintenance Minder calls for B service.

maintenance.service: Replace air cleaner element and dust/pollen filter; inspect drive belt
maintenance.notes: Dusty conditions call for air cleaner replacement every 15,000 miles; high-soot urban areas call for dust/pollen filter replacement every 15,000 miles.

interval.logic: Maintenance Minder sub item 3 for continuously variable transmission models

maintenance.notes: Mountainous low-speed driving can require fluid changes every 25,000 miles.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs and inspect valve clearance
maintenance.notes: Adjust valves during A, B, 1, 2, or 3 service if noisy.

maintenance.service: Replace engine coolant and brake fluid

interval.logic: Maintenance Minder sub items 5 and 7; if item 7 does not appear within 36 months after reset, replace brake fluid every 3 years

maintenance.notes: Do not infer fixed mileage intervals from the Maintenance Minder table.

applicability: VIN test case is Accord LX with CVT/FWD
validation_flags: Honda schedule is Maintenance Minder based; fixed mileage intervals must not be invented.
Hybrid Accord manual is a different official PDF and is not used for this LX gasoline candidate.
Rendered-page verification still required before production integration.
